confidence_justification: Extraction is medium because: (1) the PDF is a native Word-generated document with clean selectable text, so text extraction is reliable; (2) page numbers are approximate rendered pages and have not been cross-verified by a second tool or rendered-page review for every high-impact section; (3) the document is a curriculum-and-assessment guide rather than a concise syllabus, so some scope boundaries (e.g. what is excluded from each topic) are embedded in narrative text and require reviewer interpretation; (4) the latest HKEAA public-exam rules after 2020 are not guaranteed to be captured by the 2018 update. No blocking risks, but a reviewer should verify high-impact pages before the skill is marked active.
accepted_risks: Approximate page references may be off by one page in sections with front matter or blank pages.
Scope/out-of-scope boundaries for each topic are inferred from the guide's 學生應學習/學生應能 lists and overview text, not from a separate explicit exclusions table.
Assessment weightings and paper durations reflect the 2016-onwards design as stated in the guide; subsequent HKEAA updates should be checked separately.
